campaign_name: First Paid Order — Static A/B (Choice Overload vs Coffee Switch)
pmf_question: Will cold paid-social traffic pay $19 for a no-subscription First Sip Box, and which framing converts better — 'too many tea choices, here is the curated fix' (variety_seeker) or 'a better afternoon than coffee' (coffee_refugee)?
offer: First Sip Box — 3 teas for $19, no subscription
guardrail_metric: CPC > $[FA] (founder approval) OR daily CTR < 0.3% with zero CTA clicks
kill_rule: Pause immediately if: $[FA] total spend with zero checkout_cta_click events, OR CTR < 0.3% after 2,000 impressions, OR no email captures after $[FA] spend.
scale_rule: Scale winner +20%/week only if: >=1 purchase_completed AND CTR above channel minimum (Meta feed static 0.5%) AND CPC < $[FA] warning AND checkout_cta_click rate > 5% AND margin-adjusted ROAS positive (Finance sign-off) AND founder approval.
decision_rule: Review at 3 days OR $[FA] total spend, whichever comes first. Call A/B winner by checkout_cta_click rate (primary KPI), tie-broken by purchases then CTR. Output kill/iterate/scale recommendation + PMF learning + seed EXP-002.
notes_budget: budget_daily_usd, budget_total_usd, and all $[FA] thresholds in kill/guardrail/scale rules are BLANK pending founder budget approval. No ad goes live until founder sets these and approves. Single ad set, two creatives, even split.

structure.meta_campaign_objective: Sales / Conversions (optimize for checkout_cta_click via Meta Pixel InitiateCheckout, or Landing Page Views if pixel conversions not yet warmed)
structure.ad_set: One ad set, cold prospecting, US, even budget split across the 2 creatives (A/B by utm_content).
structure.audience: Interests: tea, loose leaf tea, wellness, specialty coffee — US, age 25-44. Both variants share the same audience so the only variable is creative + page framing.
structure.platform_status_at_build: PAUSED — built in Meta Ads Manager but never enabled. Founder flips live only after budget approval + Tier 6 QA sign-off.

variants.label: A
variants.pain_point: Tea stores have overwhelming choice and no guidance for a beginner; fear of buying the wrong thing.
variants.desire: A confident, curated first tea purchase — 'just tell me what to start with.'
variants.creative_angle: Problem/solution: tea stores have too many choices; here is the curated 3-tea fix.
variants.hero_headline: Tea stores have too many choices.
variants.creative_asset_status: OWED by Jared (Brand/UX) — static IG image + ad copy matching hero_headline and cta_label.

variants.label: B
variants.pain_point: Coffee jitters / afternoon crash; wants a calmer daily ritual without giving up flavor.
variants.desire: A better, calmer afternoon drink that still feels like a treat.
variants.creative_angle: Reframe: swap your afternoon coffee for a better afternoon — calmer energy, real flavor.
variants.creative_asset_status: OWED by Jared (Brand/UX) — static IG image + ad copy matching hero_headline and cta_label.

default_organic_fallback.note: Direct/organic traffic with no UTM lands on the default page framing.

instrumentation.attribution: utm_* captured client-side, decorated onto Stripe Payment Link href + client_reference_id at click time; mirrored to GA4 + PostHog + dataLayer.
instrumentation.verification: All events verified end-to-end via Playwright on local server. Live destination verification (GA4 DebugView / PostHog Live Events / Meta Pixel Helper) pending founder-supplied IDs.

blockers: Founder budget approval: budget_daily_usd, budget_total_usd, and all $[FA] kill/guardrail/scale thresholds.

Jared: 2 static creative assets (ig_static_3teas_a01, ig_static_coffeeswitch_b01) + ad copy; confirm page_variant copy-swap (choice_overload / coffee_switch / default) + cta_label match shipped landing page.
Founder credentials: GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID, POSTHOG_PROJECT_KEY+HOST, GTM_CONTAINER_ID, Meta Pixel ID — gate live event verification (Tier 6 QA).
Tier 6 full-funnel QA must pass with joint Ronny+Jared sign-off before any spend.
